title: Light emitting device package assembly and method of fabricating the same
abstract: A light emitting device package assembly including a first substrate, a plurality of light emitting device packages disposed on the first substrate, and a light conversion member disposed on the light emitting device packages. Each of the light emitting device packages includes a main body disposed on the first substrate and including a first cavity, a light source disposed in the first cavity, and a first matrix disposed in the first cavity. Further, the light conversion member includes a second substrate including a plurality of second cavities, a second matrix disposed in the second cavities, and first light conversion particles disposed in the second matrix.
claims: Claims ( 20 ) A light emitting device package assembly comprising: a first substrate; a plurality of light emitting device packages disposed on the first substrate; and a light conversion member disposed on the light emitting device packages, wherein each of the light emitting device packages comprises: a main body disposed on the first substrate and including a first cavity; a light source disposed in the first cavity; and a first matrix disposed in the first cavity, and wherein the light conversion member comprises: a second substrate including a plurality of second cavities; a second matrix disposed in the second cavities; and first light conversion particles disposed in the second matrix. The light emitting device package assembly according to claim 1, further comprising second light conversion particles disposed in the second matrix. The light emitting device package assembly according to claim 2, wherein each of the first and second light conversion particles comprises at least one of a quantum dot and phosphor. The light emitting device package assembly according to claim 1, further comprising second light conversion particles disposed in the first matrix. The light emitting device package assembly according to claim 4, wherein each of the first and second light conversion particles comprises at least one of a quantum dot and phosphor. The light emitting device package assembly according to claim 1, wherein the first and second cavities are defined at positions corresponding to each other. The light emitting device package assembly according to claim 1, wherein the first matrix comprises an organic material. The light emitting device package assembly according to claim 1, wherein the first matrix comprises an inorganic material. The light emitting device package assembly according to claim 1, further comprising a third substrate disposed on the second substrate, wherein the third substrate is disposed to cover the second cavities. The light emitting device package assembly according to claim 9, wherein the third substrate comprises an inorganic material. The light emitting device package assembly according to claim 9, wherein the second substrate and the third substrate are combined with each other. The light emitting device package assembly according to claim 9, wherein the second matrix is surrounded by the second and third substrates. The light emitting device package assembly according to claim 9, further comprising: a fourth substrate disposed under the second substrate; and a fifth substrate disposed on the third substrate. The light emitting device package assembly according to claim 13, wherein each of the second and third substrates comprises polyethylene terephthalate (PET). The light emitting device package assembly according to claim 14, wherein each of the fourth and fifth substrates comprises an inorganic material. The light emitting device package assembly according to claim 1, wherein the second cavity has a width greater than that of the first cavity. The light emitting device package assembly according to claim 16, wherein the second cavity has a width that is greater by about 1% to about 10% than that of the first cavity. The light emitting device package assembly according to claim 1, wherein at least one of the first and second cavities has a curved surface. The light emitting device package assembly according to claim 1, wherein the second substrate and a corresponding light source are spaced a distance of about 0.5 mm to about 1.0 mm from each other. A method of manufacturing a light emitting device package assembly, the method comprising: preparing a plurality of light emitting device packages disposed on a first substrate; disposing a light conversion member on the plurality of light emitting device packages; and combining the first substrate with the light conversion member, wherein each of the light emitting device packages comprises: a main body disposed on the first substrate and including a first cavity; a light source disposed in the first cavity; and a first matrix disposed in the first cavity, and wherein the light conversion member comprises: a second substrate including a plurality of second cavities; a second matrix disposed in the second cavities; and first light conversion particles disposed in the second matrix.
